case_title: SANDERS, FRANK VS SUNSET SCAVENGER CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY SANDERS, FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT SUNSET SCAVENGER CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-1995 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT C
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SUNSET SCAVENGER CO. HEARING SET FOR JAN-10-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-20-1995, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-15-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SUNSET SCAVENGER CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANDERS, FRANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUNSET SCAVENGER CO. $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $540.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-10-1996, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANDERS, FRANK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SUNSET SCAVENGER CO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
